name: Project L33T: Prologue
short_description: Dive into Project L33T, a hardcore first-person tactical extraction shooter. Confront AI foes and rival players, engage in high-stakes battles for precious loot, and risk it all in this hostile environment. Die and lose all of your gear and loot.
detailed_description:
JOIN OFFICIAL DISCORD SERVER!


About the Game

EARLY ACCESS IS NOT FOR EVERYONE

Before you decide to buy the game, we encourage you to be absolutely sure you want to play and support this game in its current state, as the kinks and bugs are still being worked out and not all features are complete. Your positive feedback is crucial for improvement.

BRAVE NEW WORLD

After the Event, evacuations and military cordons in place in each affected Zone. As a private contractor and member of the elite L.3.3.T. team, you embark on expeditions into the zone with the main task of collecting and extracting valuable artifacts. Risk all your gear to collect, secure, and extract and be prepared to lose it all if you die during the expedition.

GEAR UP

Indulge in a comprehensive and versatile character customization system that allows you to tailor your character's appearance to your liking. From hairstyles and skin shades to tattoos and face paints, along with a diverse selection of individual clothing and gear elements, you can ensure your character looks their best for any mission.

Personalize your tactical vests and plate carriers by adding vanity patches. Just like in real life, carefully insert armor plates into your carrier, which can be fully replaced with spares after intense firefights.

GUNSMITH

Prepare to experience the realistic handling of each weapon, including concepts like jamming, overheating, wear and tear, reloading, aiming, charging, and of course, shooting. And do not forget real-life ballistics and projectile hit physics.

Explore one of the most advanced weapons modding systems to date. Customize every crucial component of your firearm, from charging handles to trigger groups to handguards and buttstocks and barrels, down to the finest details.

Additionally, we've introduced the ability to custom-paint any part of your weapon with various patterns and colors. Moreover, you now have the flexibility to position attachments anywhere along rails, allowing for greater freedom and customization.

HARDCORE GAMEPLAY

Dying will mean you lose all your loot and equipment that you have brought in to the raid!

TEAM UP

Never fight alone! Team up with your friends and create a squad, ensuring you never venture into expeditions solo.

We understand the challenge faced by many survival shooters – without friends to play with, facing other players grouped together can be daunting.

To address this, we've invested significant effort in implementing "Mercs for Hire" – AI teammates available for recruitment. These AI companions behave realistically, following your orders and providing support. Not only will they assist you against other players, but they also enhance your experience, catering to those who prefer a single-player PvE-focused approach in PvEvP shooters.

ENGAGE

Experience your character's RPG-like health and physical characteristics, including hydration, energy levels, blood loss, fractures, contusions, intoxication, exhaustion, tremors, and more.

Take full control of your character with smooth speed and stance changes, as well as fluid transitions between movements like leaning and proning. Vault and climb over obstacles and use ropes to climb tall buildings, use help of other players to conquer higher barriers. Execute various tactical maneuvers such as sliding while shooting.

Discover training manuals scattered throughout the world to learn new skills and master the art of takedowns.

LOOT

Each expedition is unique. Explore a dynamic game map where loot continually spawns in new locations and buildings have varying layouts for apartments.

TRADE

Purchase needed goods and gear and sell your loot to various vendors situated in a Forward Operating Base social hub. Increase your reputation with them and unlock discounts.

Embark on a quest to discover elusive black-market broker hidden in the shadows. Exchange valuable artifacts with them to earn untraceable C.Coins, the underground currency of the world, enabling you to purchase rare illegal weapons and gear.

Photosensitivity Warning

The Project L33T contains strobing and flashing lights that could cause a small percentage of people to experience seizures when exposed to certain lights, patterns, or images.

Game features availability Warning

Please note that not all of the features mentioned above will be available at the start of Early Access.
